title: The Weekly Challenge - 153
task1_desc: Write a script to compute `Left Factorials` of `1 to 10`. Please refer [OEIS A003422](http://oeis.org/A003422) for more information.
task1_body: Write a script to compute `Left Factorials` of `1 to 10`. Please refer [OEIS A003422](http://oeis.org/A003422) for more information. ### Expected Output: 1, 2, 4, 10, 34, 154, 874, 5914, 46234, 409114
task2_desc:
You are given an integer, `$n`.

Write a script to figure out if the given integer is factorion.

> A factorion is a natural number that equals the sum of the factorials of its digits.
task2_body:
You are given an integer, `$n`. Write a script to figure out if the given integer is factorion. > A factorion is a natural number that equals the sum of the factorials of its digits. ### Example 1: Input: $n = 145 Output: 1 Since 1! + 4! + 5! => 1 + 24 + 120 = 145 ### Example 2: Input: $n = 123 Output: 0 Since 1! + 2! + 3! => 1 + 2 + 6 <> 123
Last date to submit the solution **23:59 (UK Time) Sunday 27th February 2022**.
